1.content:
Welcome to the story! In this tale, our harem hero, Marco Diaz, sees the world from the perspective of a puny insect and has to survive while surrounded by all of the ladies he's come to know, who are all much bigger than him. But right now, the question is which girl is the giantess that will be the focus of his micro-sized adventure? Will it be:

Star Butterfly - His best friend for life and the main character of the show; in a story with her, she uses her newly-learned shrinking spell to reduce Marco to minuscule proportions and is completely unaware of his miniature stature.

Jackie Lynn Thomas - The girl of his dreams, and why wouldn't she be? Her platinum blonde hair with a teal streak, her cool attitude and love for skateboarding and pizza nuggets, and her curvy figure overall makes her a goddess to the shrunken safe kid. (Note: her story is to be set before their breakup in Season 3. I apologize for any spoilers.)

Janna Ordonia - Strange, sometimes crazy, and an expert in the supernatural and all things cryptic and dark magic-related. She also always has a way of surprising people with how much she knows about Marco (considering she has all of his info, including his Social Security Number and passwords).

StarFan13 - Star's somewhat creepy and geeky, obsessed fangirl who seems to know everything about her.
1.title: Marco Diaz's Shrunken Adventures!

choices: Continue with shrinking Marco or Giantess growth.
15.content:
There are other ladies to choose from including a few in the other dimensions:

Moon Butterfly - Star Butterfly's mother and queen of Mewni.

Eclipsa, the Queen of Darkness - Mistress of dark magic and married to the king of the monsters, Globgor.

Kelly - The green-haired girl who comes from the dimension of living hair people who seem to have a lust for fighting and violence.

Heckapoo - Forger of all dimensional scissors, who practically made Marco the oldest-living man on earth (along with giving him a six-pack of hot abs and a burning bald spot). She sure is a flaming hot demon woman, so Marco might need a fire-proof suit, if they have any in his size.
15.title: Others.

155.content: Still a few more woman in the show to cover. However, should we stay on the path where Marco ends up at the size of a bug or shall we switch to him being normal-sized and in the hands of his harem girls who grow to gigantic proportions?
155.title: Continue with shrinking Marco or Giantess growth.

info.brief_description: Marco Diaz gets shrunken while surrounded by the "BIG" girls in his life.
info.description:
Direct from "Star vs. the Forces of Evil," Star Butterfly casts a spell that shrinks Marco Diaz to the size of an ant (roughly between 0.5 inches-1 inch tall). Now Marco goes on dangerous tiny adventures while at the mercy of all of the gigantic, normal-sized girls in his life, who are all completely unaware of his tiny presence.

Marco was pretty much the only choice for this considering the fact that he's the fandom's coveted harem master to all of the show's female characters.

Some of my ideas for this story, I've gained inspiration which came from these fan fictions from BiggerBetterBarbie:
https://www.deviantart.com/biggerbetterbarbie/art/Star-vs-The-Forces-of-Evil-Sta...
https://www.deviantart.com/biggerbetterbarbie/art/SvTFoE-Star-You-Shrunk-the-Tee...
https://www.deviantart.com/biggerbetterbarbie/art/SvTFoE-Star-You-Shrunk-the-Adu...

Rules:
1. There are two options: either Marco shrinks to bug size or any girl on the show grows gigantic.
2. For shrinking, ONLY Marco gets shrunken, no other shrinking males. Interaction is F/Marco only.
3. In the giantess path, one or more girls grow to giant size, and keep Marco as their buddy.
4. Please use correct grammar, spelling, and punctuation.
5. While shrunken, all of the giantess girls are to stay unaware of the tiny Marco unless there is the option that he actually gets their attention.
6. Oral Vore, Mouth play, Stomp, Body exploration, Endosoma, Nasal Vore, Breast Play, and Hair forest are all allowed.
7. Forbidden: Scat, Toilet Stuff, Anal Vore, Hard Vore, Sex, Unbirth
8. Marco cannot die and is indigestible.
9. Do not end the story.
10. No one sentence chapters.
